calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
James McCarthy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jessica Gaston, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Kimberly Dodd and Danielle Weerlh, ind and dba Nail Lounge.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Counsel to prepare a blank proposed Judgment.

May 5, 2006
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Sue Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details.

Re-Notice Of Motion Compelling Discovery; Sanctions Req.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James Steven McCarthy, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party
Danielle Weerth, Kimberly Dodd, Defendants appeared In Propria Persona,

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Jessica Gaston's Motion To Compel Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond to Special Interrogatories, Sets One and Two; and Request For Production of Documents, Sets One and Two. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions are denied as there is no declaration supporting the amount of any monetary sanctions. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040] - Respond within 10 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Order To Show Cause Re: Sanctions As To Danielle Weerth And Kimberly Dodd
